modules/cache/cache_common.h

16
17/**
18 * @file cache_common.h
19 * @brief Common Cache structs
20 *
21 * @defgroup Cache_cache  Cache Functions
22 * @ingroup  MOD_CACHE
23 * @{
24 */ view japanese
25
26#ifndef CACHE_COMMON_H
27#define CACHE_COMMON_H
28
29/* a cache control header breakdown */ view japanese
30typedef struct cache_control {
31    unsigned int parsed:1;
32    unsigned int cache_control:1;
33    unsigned int pragma:1;
34    unsigned int no_cache:1;
35    unsigned int no_cache_header:1; /* no cache by header match */ view japanese
36    unsigned int no_store:1;
37    unsigned int max_age:1;
38    unsigned int max_stale:1;
39    unsigned int min_fresh:1;
40    unsigned int no_transform:1;
41    unsigned int only_if_cached:1;
42    unsigned int public:1;
43    unsigned int private:1;
44    unsigned int private_header:1; /* private by header match */ view japanese
45    unsigned int must_revalidate:1;
46    unsigned int proxy_revalidate:1;
47    unsigned int s_maxage:1;
48    unsigned int invalidated:1; /* has this entity been invalidated? */ view japanese
49    apr_int64_t max_age_value; /* if positive, then set */
50    apr_int64_t max_stale_value; /* if positive, then set */
51    apr_int64_t min_fresh_value; /* if positive, then set */
52    apr_int64_t s_maxage_value; /* if positive, then set */ view japanese
53} cache_control_t;
54
55#endif /* CACHE_COMMON_H */ view japanese
56/** @} */ view japanese

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_common.h:17-24

 * @file cache_common.h
 * @brief 共通キャッシュ構造体

 * @ingroup  MOD_CACHE
 * @{
 */
